metric_caveats: Record_ids are the same enriched 25-record validation slice used by gan_s0_gpt4_1_mini_error_taxonomy_policy_v1_4_slice.
The slice is enriched for Qwen pragmatic-category mismatches and is a search/diagnostic surface, not a full-validation estimate.
Prompt version, model track, context policy, repair policy, scorer, and record set are held fixed against v1.4 control; only deterministic candidate-builder coverage changed.
Do not transfer to Qwen unless this GPT slice beats v1.4 or provides preregistered transferability signal.
